Name: Cybersecurity Ticket Enrichment with MITRE & AI
Description: An n8n workflow that enriches Zendesk tickets using MITRE ATT&CK data by embedding it into a Qdrant vector store and querying with OpenAI's GPT-4 and embeddings. It automates extraction of TTPs, remediation steps, and historical context from SIEM alerts using LangChain agents and structured parsers.

Name: Cybersecurity Incident Analysis with MITRE & AI
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4, MITRE ATT&CK data from Google Drive, and Qdrant vector DB to analyze and enrich Zendesk security tickets. Automates TTP extraction, remediation advice, and historical pattern detection using Langchain agents and embeddings.

Name: SecurityScorecard Report Automation
Description: An n8n workflow automating the generation and download of full SecurityScorecard reports for a given domain using the SecurityScorecard API. It triggers manually and sequentially fetches, limits, then downloads JSON scorecard data for security insights.

Name: Website Security Scanner & Audit Report
Description: An n8n workflow to scan a given website URL for client-side security vulnerabilities and misconfigurations. Uses HTTP Requests to fetch page and headers, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini models for detailed security analysis of HTTP headers and page content, merges AI insights, and emails a comprehensive, HTML report via Gmail. Ideal for developers wanting automated website security assessments.

Name: Weekly Shodan IP & Port Security Monitor
Description: n8n workflow that weekly checks specified IPs and ports via Shodan API for unexpected open ports, formats results in Markdown tables, and sends alerts to TheHive security platform. Uses HTTP Request, Markdown, and TheHive nodes for automation.

Name: Palo Alto Security Advisory Monitor
Description: Automates monitoring of Palo Alto Networks security advisories via RSS feed, filters for relevant products, creates Jira issues for critical alerts, and emails customers. Utilizes RSS Feed, Jira API, Gmail API, and dynamic filtering for streamlined security alert management.
